# Hollywood Coon
> Premium Maine Coon cattery in Los Angeles, California. TICA-registered since 2018.

## Key Entities
- Cattery: Hollywood Coon
- Breed: Maine Coon
- Location: Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Registry: TICA
- Breeding Cats: Atlas (Brown Classic Tabby Champion), Elara (Blue Smoke)

## Services
- Available kittens: Aurora, Luna, Thor, Caspian
- Health testing: HCM echo, PKD1/SMA DNA, FIV/FeLV
- Shipping: nationwide (US), flight nanny available
- Waiting list: $500 deposit

## Contact
- Email: hello@hollywoodcoon.com
- Phone: (424) 555-0198
- Website: https://hollywoodcoon.com

- / — Home page: hero, key stats, about preview, kittens preview

- /kitten-detail-2.html — Titan: Brown Classic Tabby male
- /kitten-detail-3.html — Luna: Silver Tabby female
- /kitten-detail-4.html — Thor: Black Smoke male
- /kitten-detail-5.html — Stella: Blue Tabby female
- /kitten-detail-6.html — Caspian: Red Mackerel Tabby male
